description: This is a modern 'Namespaces View' dashboard for your Kubernetes cluster(s). Made for kube-prometheus-stack and take advantage of the latest Grafana features. GitHub repository: https://github.com/dotdc/grafana-dashboards-kubernetes

targets.expr: max without (alertstate) ((ALERTS{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", severity="critical", alertstate="firing"} * 2) or (ALERTS{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", alertstate="pending"} * 1) or (ALERTS{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", severity="warning"} * 1))

panels.title: Namespace(s) usage on total cluster CPU in %
Namespace(s) usage on total cluster RAM in %

targets.expr: sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", resource="cpu", cluster=~"$cluster"} and on(namespace, pod) max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Running", namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster"} == 1))

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", resource="cpu", cluster=~"$cluster"} and on(namespace, pod) max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Running", namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster"} == 1))

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", resource="memory", cluster=~"$cluster"} and on(namespace, pod) max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Running", namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster"} == 1))

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", resource="memory", cluster=~"$cluster"} and on(namespace, pod) max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Running", namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster"} == 1))

panels.description: No data is generally a good thing here.
panels.title: OOM Events by namespace, pod

panels.description: No data is generally a good thing here.
panels.title: Container Restarts by namespace, pod

panels.description: List of pods that are not in Running or Succeeded status.
panels.title: Pods with unexpected status

targets.expr: max(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster"}) by (persistentvolumeclaim, namespace) / max(kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster"}) by (persistentvolumeclaim, namespace)

panels.title: Persistent Volumes - Capacity and usage in %
Persistent Volumes - Capacity and usage in bytes

list.description: Can be used to filter on a specific deployment, statefulset or deamonset (only relevant panels).
list.name: created_by

title: Namespaces
